headline: Proceed with conditions: 87% recurring revenue is durable, but a 26%-of-ARR renewal cliff and an unreconciled ARR figure must close pre-LOI

key_facts.fact: Revenue is 87% recurring subscription on $8.2M FY2025 total (see Section 3)
key_facts.cite_quote: Subscription ARR:         7,100

key_facts.fact: $1,940K (26% of ARR) sits in four contracts expiring within 12 months with no auto-renew (see Section 4)
key_facts.cite_quote: Combined ARR at risk: $1,940K (26% of total ARR).

key_facts.fact: ARR is stated three different ways across the data room (6,200 / 7,100 / 7,400); must reconcile before pricing (see Section 8)
key_facts.cite_quote: ARR (as of 2025-12-31):     6,200   (management flash, pre-audit reconciliation)

key_facts.fact: Ask of ~5x ARR ($35M) requires the ARR base and the renewal cliff resolved to underwrite (see Section 8)
key_facts.cite_quote:
at a valuation of ~5x ARR
($35M)

headline: B2B SaaS data-sync platform with 103 customers and $82K average ACV, founded 2019

key_facts.fact: No-code connector hub synchronizing enterprise data across cloud and on-premise systems for mid-market manufacturers and logistics firms
key_facts.cite_quote:
Acme DataSync Inc. ("Acme" or the "Company") is a B2B SaaS platform
that synchronizes enterprise data across cloud and on-premise systems.

key_facts.fact: Average contract value is $82K, sold by a 9-AE direct team on a 45-90 day cycle
key_facts.cite_quote: Average ACV: $82K. Sales cycle: 45-90 days.

key_facts.fact: 103 customers as of FY2025 per the financial summary
key_facts.cite_quote: Customers:                   103

risks.risk: Single-product dependency; no second product line disclosed

open_questions: Provide product roadmap and any second-product revenue contribution.

headline: TAM/SAM and competitive share not disclosed in the data room — a gap for management

key_facts.fact: Targets mid-market manufacturers and logistics firms with legacy ERP plus modern cloud tools
key_facts.cite_quote: who maintain legacy ERP systems alongside modern cloud tools.

key_facts.fact: Market sizing (TAM/SAM) not disclosed
key_facts.cite_quote: Not available — open question for management

key_facts.fact: Competitive share and named substitutes not disclosed
key_facts.cite_quote: Not available — open question for management

risks.risk: No methodology-backed TAM/SAM; market thesis unverifiable from data room

open_questions: Provide a methodology-backed TAM/SAM for the data-sync segment in manufacturing and logistics.
Name the top three competitors and substitution risks.

headline: 76% gross margin but only 9% EBITDA on 35%-of-revenue S&M; adj. EBITDA of $1.2M leans on a $320K founder-comp addback

key_facts.fact: Gross margin is 76% on $8.2M revenue
key_facts.cite_quote: Gross Profit:               6,230  (76% gross margin)

key_facts.fact: Unadjusted EBITDA is only 9% of revenue, driven by S&M at 35% of revenue
key_facts.cite_quote: EBITDA:                       736  (9% EBITDA margin)

key_facts.fact: Adjusted EBITDA of $1,206K depends on a $320K above-market founder-salary addback (44% of the $470K addback bridge)
key_facts.cite_quote: Founder salary above market rate:    320  (replacement cost est. $180K)

key_facts.fact: DSO of 41 days is in range; deferred revenue of $890K inflates reported working capital
key_facts.cite_quote: Accounts receivable:          920  (avg DSO: 41 days)

risks.risk: Founder-comp addback ($320K) overstates run-rate EBITDA vs $180K replacement cost
Thin 9% unadjusted EBITDA leaves no margin for S&M efficiency miss

open_questions: Confirm the $180K CFO/founder replacement cost with a signed offer or market comp.

headline: Top-10 are 68.9% of ARR; four contracts (26% of ARR) expire within 12 months with no auto-renew

key_facts.fact: Top-10 customers are 68.9% of total ARR
key_facts.cite_quote: TOP-10 AS % OF ARR:            68.9%

key_facts.fact: Largest customer (Theta Manufacturing) is 12.4% of ARR and expires 2026-06-30 with no auto-renew
key_facts.cite_quote:
Customer #1 (Theta Manufacturing): 12.4% of ARR. Below 20% threshold
  but contract expires 2026-06-30 with no auto-renew. Renewal risk.

key_facts.fact: $1,940K (26% of total ARR) is at renewal risk across customers #1, #3, #6, #9
key_facts.cite_quote: Combined ARR at risk: $1,940K (26% of total ARR).

key_facts.fact: NRR is 112% and logo churn 8% for the FY2025 cohort
key_facts.cite_quote: NRR (Net Revenue Retention): 112%  (synthetic; FY2025 cohort)

risks.risk: 26% of ARR in non-auto-renewing contracts expiring within 12 months

open_questions: Provide renewal status / verbal commitments for the four expiring no-auto-renew contracts.

headline: Top customer can terminate on change of control with 30 days' notice; IP is owned by the company

key_facts.fact: On a change of control, the customer may terminate on 30 days' notice within 90 days of closing
key_facts.cite_quote:
Customer may, at its sole discretion,
terminate this Agreement upon 30 days written notice delivered within 90
days of the closing of such Change of Control transaction.

key_facts.fact: Software, algorithms, and documentation are the sole and exclusive property of the company
key_facts.cite_quote:
All software, algorithms, and associated documentation remain the sole
and exclusive property of Provider.

key_facts.fact: Liability is capped at the prior 12 months of fees paid
key_facts.cite_quote:
IN NO EVENT SHALL EITHER PARTY'S AGGREGATE LIABILITY EXCEED THE FEES
PAID BY CUSTOMER IN THE TWELVE MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM.

risks.risk: Change-of-control termination right held by the largest customer (12.4% of ARR)

open_questions: Confirm how many other MSAs carry the same change-of-control termination clause.

headline: Founders will roll equity, but no CFO is named and replacement-cost basis is unverified — a Day-1 gap

key_facts.fact: Full management team is available to roll equity
key_facts.cite_quote: Full management team available to roll equity.

key_facts.fact: Founder draws above-market salary; replacement cost estimated at $180K but no named successor
key_facts.cite_quote: Founder salary above market rate:    320  (replacement cost est. $180K)

key_facts.fact: Org chart and key-person retention terms not disclosed
key_facts.cite_quote: Not available — open question for management

risks.risk: No named CFO/finance leader; founder dependency post-close

open_questions: Provide org chart, key-person retention/non-compete terms, and CFO hiring plan.

headline: Integration scope not disclosed in the data room — systems overlap and synergy timeline are open questions

key_facts.fact: 87 employees per the CIM (contradicts the 91 in the financial summary; see reconcile)
key_facts.cite_quote: **Employees:** 87 (synthetic)

key_facts.fact: Day-1 systems overlap and integration cost not disclosed
key_facts.cite_quote: Not available — open question for management

key_facts.fact: Synergy timeline and headcount plan post-close not disclosed
key_facts.cite_quote: Not available — open question for management

risks.risk: Integration cost and synergy realization unquantified

open_questions: Provide a 100-day integration plan with systems inventory and synergy targets.
reconcile_flags: Headcount differs: CIM states 87 employees vs financial summary 91 full-time employees — reconcile basis (payroll vs synthetic count) before close.

headline: Ask of ~5x ARR ($35M) is unpriceable until the ARR base (6,200 vs 7,100 vs 7,400) is reconciled

key_facts.fact: Founders seek ~5x ARR ($35M) from a strategic or growth-equity buyer
key_facts.cite_quote:
at a valuation of ~5x ARR
($35M)

key_facts.fact: ARR is stated as 6,200 in the management flash, contradicting the root data room
key_facts.cite_quote: ARR (as of 2025-12-31):     6,200   (management flash, pre-audit reconciliation)

key_facts.fact: Financial summary states ARR of 7,400 including Jan 2026 signed contracts — a different basis again
key_facts.cite_quote: ARR (as of 2025-12-31):     7,400  (includes Jan 2026 signed contracts)

key_facts.fact: At $35M ask, the 6,200 vs 7,400 ARR spread swings the entry multiple from 5.6x to 4.7x — a material pricing range
key_facts.cite_quote: Not available — open question for management

risks.risk: $35M ask priced off an unreconciled ARR base spanning 6,200-7,400

open_questions: Provide an audited, single ARR definition with the contract-by-contract bridge from 6,200 to 7,400.
Provide six SaaS comparables to benchmark the 5x ARR ask.
reconcile_flags: ARR contradiction: CIM/financial-summary state 7,100-7,400 vs financials/Q-summary 6,200 — resolved here by naming the delta and requiring an audited single figure pre-LOI.
